name: Gaslamp Cases 4: The Arcane Village
short_description: Play the 4. part of the serial. Embark on a new adventure with Morgan and Jack to solve a twisted mystery! Match-3 puzzles will test your skills as you proceed through each level. 5 chapters and 20 upgrades let you follow Morgan and his allies every step of the way to see the story unfold.
detailed_description:
Detective Morgan Johnson and his partner Jack Brown have solved many cases that have left their colleagues stumped, but the one mystery they’ve never answered is the origin of their friend Eleanor. Having vanished in pursuit of these answers, Eleanor is nowhere to be found, and they decide it is their duty as her friend to help.

While following Eleanor’s trail, Morgan and Jack find themselves stranded near an isolated village where dark rituals are performed.

What is the secret of the village’s curse and the rituals that demand human sacrifice? What connection does it have to Eleanor, who has gone there in search of the truth? As Jack and Morgan delve into the darkness that surrounds the strange village, they’ll soon learn that their very lives are on the line.

Game Features:

- Embark on another adventure with Morgan and Jack to solve a new, twisted mystery!

- Match-3 puzzles will test your skills as you proceed through each stage of the journey.

- 5 chapters and 20 upgrades let you follow Morgan and his allies every step of the way to see the story unfold.

- Dark powers rise to the surface as Morgan finds himself in one of the most dangerous investigations yet.
